examples: To enable rental increases, you have to have luxurious furnishings.
The millionaire leads a luxurious life.
A carpenter will build a luxurious model for about seventy-five dollars.
The food at Azalea is luxurious (sake-marinated Chilean sea bass with shrimp dumplings), the ambience hip.
Estancia accommodations range from luxurious suites with private fireplaces to rustic rooms with hardwood floors.
